goal: Real-data benchmark revealed Tier 0 classifier fails on ElevenLabs voices. Added 58-dim feature variant (per-frame mean+std + spectral rolloff + log-mel energy stats) to extract_features; 5-way closed-set ELEVENLABS REAL accuracy improved 16% -> 24% (chance 20%). Confirmed handcrafted features cannot separate similar-quality studio TTS voices — synthetic formant-synth corpus was artificially favorable. README updated with the honest real-world floor + 'use only for dramatic user/bot voice contrast' guidance. E8 logged. Phase 07 planned for Tier 1 ONNX ECAPA-TDNN upgrade.
